changelog: v3.2.1 — UI scale slider in Settings (80-130%, persists per browser), scrollable navbar with pinned logout button, CSS cache-buster. v3.2.0 — Suppliers LBP payment fixed, thermal 80mm receipt print (POS/Customers/Reports), debt settled line on receipt, LBP input for debt settlement at POS, Hold Sale & Resume, Edit Receipts, Edit Purchases, Owner Cash Tracker, Box price display, Unified cash drawer USD/LBP.
